message_text: I do want to clear this loan, but I cannot pay the full amount today.

I’m an AI agent acting on behalf of Nira, and this conversation is being logged. I’m contacting you about your Nira loan ending ****4831. To verify I’m speaking with the right person, please confirm the last four digits of the account reference.
The account ends in 4831. I’m willing to discuss a payment plan, but I can’t clear the full amount today.
Understood. Your current amount due is 12921. You’re saying you want to discuss a payment plan and cannot clear the full amount today. What amount could you pay now?
I can pay 2000 today, and after my salary comes in next week I should be able to pay a larger amount. If possible, can we set up a plan around that?
Understood. You can pay 2000 today and a larger amount after your salary comes in next week, and you’re asking for a payment plan. I’m handing this to the next agent to review available options.

Thanks. Please let me know what plan is possible—I can make 2000 today, but I need the rest scheduled after my salary next week.

Given the current policy, I can record a payment-plan request based on 2,000 today with the remaining balance to be completed by 2026-04-20, which is within the 30-day limit. I cannot confirm exact approved installment terms from the available data in this turn. If you want to proceed on that basis, I can record that request now. If you want reduced-closure review instead, exact approvable terms are also not available from the current data.
Yes, please record the payment-plan request on that basis. I can pay 2,000 today, and I’ll complete the remaining balance by 2026-04-20.

I’ve recorded your request for a payment-plan review based on 2,000 today and the remaining balance by 2026-04-20. Exact approved terms are not available from the current data, so I cannot confirm an arrangement in this turn. If an approved option is returned, that will be the next step.
Thanks, that works for now—I’ll make the 2,000 payment today and wait for the approved option to come back.

Understood. I’ve recorded that you intend to make 2,000 today and wait for the review outcome on the request to complete the remaining balance by 2026-04-20. No approved arrangement is confirmed yet. You’ll be contacted only if an approved option is available.

Hardship signals in case state remain job_loss and student, with no new hardship detail in this turn. Agent 2 checked available loan and lender policy data; policy confirms no extensions beyond 30 days, and the borrower\u2019s requested completion date fits that boundary, but exact approvable payment-plan terms could not be retrieved; exact approvable reduced-closure terms also could not be retrieved. No objection beyond waiting for review, and no stop-contact request; however, the borrower stated a limited contact preference to wait and hear back only if an approved option is available. Agent 2 told the borrower the standalone payment intent and pending review were recorded, that no approved arrangement is confirmed yet, and that they will be contacted only if an approved option becomes available. Agent 3 should continue naturally without restarting, avoid repeating disclosures, verification, or previously unavailable-term explanations unless there is a new concrete outcome, and contact the borrower only if there is an approved option or documented review result to present."}
